Dredge the lobster tails in cornstarch and fry at ~350°F for ~3 minutes
Fry the head for ~15 seconds or until bright red
In a preheated carbon steel skillet, saute the garlic, ginger and jalapeno first until fragrant
Add the lobster tails and claws and cook for ~30 seconds or until pan comes back up to temp
Deglaze with sake for ~45 seconds, then add the canto sauce.
Keep pan moving to prevent burning the aromatics and to coat the lobster
Then add butter, allow to emulsify into sauce, then add water as needed to taste
Plate into the copper skillet, first the tails in a line, then claws sporadically
Cover with the sauced aromatics and sauce, then garnish last with the head over the bodies.
